positive: A highly detailed, stylized symmetrical composition featuring a celestial biome merging with deep flora. The central image is a stylized, glowing crescent moon cradling complex root structures that transition into swirling, fractal nebula clouds. Incorporate repeating geometric patterns derived from mandalas and interwoven botanical elements like stylized ferns, phosphorescent lilies, and crystalline vines. The color palette must utilize deep sapphire blues, glowing teal accents, luminous lavender, and stark negative space black. Style must be a blend of Art Nouveau etching and modern synthwave vaporwave aesthetic, using clean silhouettes, heavy ink lines, and vibrant bioluminescent glows. Composition must be centered, optimized for a square fabric print, ensuring high contrast and scalable detail. Dramatic, ethereal backlighting.
